assessment_objectives.objective: cybersecurity / data privacy attributes associated with subjects are defined.
cybersecurity / data privacy attributes associated with objects are defined.
subjects to be associated with cybersecurity / data privacy attributes are defined.
objects to be associated with cybersecurity / data privacy attributes are defined.
cybersecurity / data privacy policies that require personnel to associate and maintain the association of cybersecurity / data privacy attributes with subjects and objects.

personnel are required to associate and maintain the association of organization-defined cybersecurity / data privacy attributes with organization-defined subjects in accordance with organization-defined policies.

personnel are required to associate and maintain the association of organization-defined cybersecurity / data privacy attributes with organization-defined objects in accordance with organization-defined policies.
